watchlist.trigger: Pullback to 0.7080-0.7090 zone OR clean break >0.7190 with volume
watchlist.entry_plan: PRIMARY: Long at ~0.7085 on pullback with rejection confirmation. SECONDARY: If breaks above Fri high 0.7186 with volume + 15M BOS, enter on retest.
watchlist.thesis: TOP PICK (Conv 4 → 5 pending confirmation). Multi-factor tailwind: (1) Hawkish RBA pricing 3rd hike in May to 4.35% (highest in G10), (2) Dovish Fed repricing — year-end cut odds 50%, (3) Hormuz reopen + OPEC+ supply = risk-on, (4) Solid China Q1 supports AUD. AUDUSD at multi-year highs. DXY broke 98 lowest since Iran war.
watchlist.invalidation: If AUDUSD drops below 0.7000 OR Iran deal formally fails by Apr 22, cancel.

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~160.00-160.10. Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026 — 160 is the red line. MoF Katayama escalated verbal intervention at G7 this weekend, said 'high sense of urgency' on FX.
watchlist.size_plan: Calculate via risk_guard — keep small given binary risk
watchlist.thesis: ASYMMETRIC TRADE (Conv 3). MoF verbal intervention active. Daily RSI overbought. BoJ Apr 27-28 priced for hold at 0.75% (~5bps of hike). MoF forced to jawbone due to BoJ delay. R:R ~3:1 to 5:1.
watchlist.invalidation: If USDJPY breaks 160.50 cleanly without intervention, cancel.

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~1.3820 on bounce to resistance.
watchlist.thesis: DXY weakness play (Conv 3). DXY sub-98 now — strongest signal yet. Oil at $87 is a drag but still above pre-crisis $75. CAD PM Carney majority = stability. R:R ~1.5:1 to 2.5:1.

watchlist.re_entry_conditions: Need new base above 1.1780 + fresh push above 1.1811 with volume + 15M BOS + retest. Day high 1.17753 is close — watch.

watchlist.re_entry_logic: Original rule required 'Iran extension CONFIRMED' before short re-entry below $89. Reuters explicitly denies formal signing. Apr 22 expiry live. NO SHORT here — if deal unravels, WTI explodes back to $95-100+ in hours. Wait for formal confirmation.
watchlist.catalyst_today: Strait of Hormuz temporarily reopened + OPEC+ +206k bpd May increase + ceasefire extension optimism.

market_context.session: MONDAY LONDON SESSION. Apr 20 18:35 IST / 13:05 UTC. 0 positions open. Capital $10,000 intact. First tick of Monday week. No triggers hit yet — all 3 active watchlist setups waiting for level touch.
key_events_upcoming: Apr 22 (Wed): US-Iran ceasefire ORIGINAL EXPIRY — formal extension still pending. Binary risk event.
Apr 27-28: BoJ policy meeting (hold at 0.75%, 82% odds) — USDJPY short window closing
Apr 28-29: FOMC meeting (Fed hold expected, but 50% year-end cut priced)
Any day: Formal Iran extension announcement (in-principle since Fri)
market_context.hormuz_status: TEMPORARY REOPEN over weekend. Apr 22 original ceasefire expiry still live. Reuters: senior US official DENIES formal extension signed. Round 2 Pakistan talks ongoing. Mediators (Qatar, Saudi, Turkey via Pakistan PM) active. Headline risk in both directions this week.
market_context.dominant_theme: RISK-ON PARTIALLY CONFIRMED. Multi-asset moves align — DXY sub-98, WTI -4%, Gold -0.62%, AUD multi-year highs, BTC +0.89%. AUDUSD long thesis strengthening from Conv 4 → potentially 5 on entry. But missing formal Iran signature keeps tail risk live. Discipline: no chasing, wait for clean level touch + confirmation.

Tape disconnect: oil -1.1%, gold -0.79%, USD bid — market still pricing deal-by-deadline. Binary remains: confirmed US damage→spike, formal deal→collapse.
